final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing fantasy illustration of an underwater fairy-tale world with a mermaid exploring coral reefs.

Style/medium: dreamy fantasy illustration, whimsical storybook aesthetic, Studio Ghibli-inspired underwater wonderland
Composition: wide establishing shot from mid-water level, soft depth of field, fish-eye perspective hinting at vast ocean depth
Subject: graceful mermaid with flowing hair and iridescent tail swimming among coral formations, surrounded by bioluminescent jellyfish
Scene/backdrop: vibrant coral reef ecosystem, sunken treasure chest with scattered gold coins, wooden shipwreck draped in seaweed, sunbeams piercing through water surface from above
Lighting/mood: ethereal god rays streaming from surface, soft volumetric light filtering through water, magical and serene atmosphere
Color palette: jewel-tone corals (pinks, purples, oranges) as base, turquoise and deep blue water gradients, golden treasure accents, bioluminescent cyan glow from jellyfish
Materials/textures: translucent jellyfish bells with soft inner glow, weathered wood of shipwreck, rough coral textures, flowing fabric-like mermaid hair
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, horror elements, murky darkness, cluttered composition, 8K stuffer aesthetic
